title: Deep Learning
subtitle: An MIT Press Book on the Theory and Practice of Deep Neural Networks
author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, and Aaron Courville
themes: Deep neural network architectures and training methodology
The mathematical foundations of representation learning
Practical engineering for building and deploying deep learning systems
The relationship between deep learning and human cognition
awards: One of the most cited computer science books of the 2010s
Endorsed by Elon Musk as the only comprehensive deep learning book
Used as the primary textbook in top university deep learning courses worldwide
excerpt: Deep Learning by Goodfellow, Bengio, and Courville is the definitive textbook on deep learning. Covering everything from the mathematical foundations to advanced research topics, it has become the standard reference for students, researchers, and practitioners entering the field.
